name: Crockpot Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 oz) Beef/Oxtail soup or 1/2 pint Beef stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the beef with seasoned flour.
2. Sauté the onion in oil until translucent.
3. Transfer the sautéed onions to the slow cooker.
4. Brown the beef in the slow cooker, placing it on top of the onions.
5. Add mushrooms and dried herbs (if using).
6. Pour over the soup or stock.
7. Cook on High for 4-5 hours or on Low for 8-10 hours.
- Note that less liquid is needed than with conventional cooking,
and vegetables should be placed at the bottom of the crockpot
with the meat on top.
